summary: Preinstall script reads /flag.txt and PUTs contents to local dev services
details: On `npm install`, the preinstall hook in index.js reads `/flag.txt` (falling back to `execSync('cat /flag*')`) and PUTs the harvested contents to 127.0.0.1 on ports 3000, 8080, 80, 1337, 8000, and 3001 at path `/api/modules/ECT-987654`. The package self-describes as a 'Probe' and the name/version pattern (ect-839201@100.0.8) is consistent with a CTF/red-team probe. Although the network destination is loopback rather than a remote attacker host, the install-time behavior reads an installer-owned sensitive file and injects its contents into whichever local HTTP service answers on those common development ports — a lateral data push into the installer's running dev stack triggered automatically at install.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
